# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.

Prevent kong no auth.
# Category: kong_no_auth

- 200
          request_method:
            - GET
          content_type:
            - "application/json; charset=utf-8"
          cache_ttl: 300
          strategy: memory
          memory:
            dictionary_name: kong_db_cache
      - name: request-size-limiting
        config:
          allowed_payload_size: 10
          size_unit: megabytes
          require_content_length: false
      - name: request-transformer
        config:
          add:
            headers:
              - "X-Service-Name: product-service"
              - "X-Gateway-Forwarded: true"
    routes:
      - name: product-service-list-create
        paths:
          - /api/v1/products
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
        protocols:
          - http
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        tags:
          - product
          - v1

      - name: product-service-detail
        paths:
          - /api/v1/products/(?<product_id>[a-zA-Z0-9\-]+)$
        methods:
          - GET
          - PUT
          - PATCH
          - DELETE
        protocols:
          - http
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        regex_priority: 1
        tags:
          - product
          - v1

      - name: product-service-categories
        paths:
          - /api/v1/categories
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
        protocols:
          - http
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        tags:
          - product
          - v1

      - name: product-service-category-products
        paths:
          - /api/v1/categories/(?<category_id>[a-zA-Z0-9\-]+)/products
        methods:
          - GET
        protocols:
          - http
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        regex_priority: 1
        tags:
          - product
          - v1

      - name: product-service-search
        paths:
          - /api/v1/products/search
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
        protocols:
          - http
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        regex_priority: 3
        tags:
          - product
          - v1

      - name: product-service-inventory
        paths:
          - /api/v1/products/(?<product_id>[a-zA-Z0-9\-]+)/inventory
        methods:
          - GET
          - PUT
        protocols:
          - http
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        regex_priority: 2
        tags:
          - product
          - v1

  # ===========================================================================
  # Payment Service
  # ===========================================================================
  - name: payment-service
    url: http://payment-service-upstream:8004
    protocol: http
    host: payment-service-upstream
    port: 8004
    path: /
    retries: 2
    connect_timeout: 15000
    write_timeout: 60000
    read_timeout: 60000
    tags:
      - payment
      - critical
    plugins:
      # Strict rate limiting for payment endpoints
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 15
          hour: 500
          policy: local
          fault_tolerant: false
          hide_client_headers: false
      - name: acl
        config:
          allow:
            - payment-service-access
            - admin-access
          hide_groups_header: true
      - name: request-size-limiting
        config:
          allowed_payload_size: 1
          size_unit: megabytes
          require_content_length: true
      # Additional request validation for payment
      - name: request-transformer
        config:
          add:
            headers:
              - "X-Service-Name: payment-service"
              - "X-Gateway-Forwarded: true"
              - "X-Security-Context: payment-critical"
    routes:
      - name: payment-service-process
        paths:
          - /api/v1/payments
        methods:
          - POST
          - GET
        protocols:
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        tags:
          - payment
          - v1

      - name: payment-service-detail
        paths:
          - /api/v1/payments/(?<payment_id>[a-zA-Z0-9\-]+)$
        methods:
          - GET
        protocols:
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        regex_priority: 1
        tags:
          - payment
          - v1

      - name: payment-service-refund
        paths:
          - /api/v1/payments/(?<payment_id>[a-zA-Z0-9\-]+)/refund
        methods:
          - POST
        protocols:
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        regex_priority: 2
        tags:
          - payment
          - v1

      - name: payment-service-methods
        paths:
          - /api/v1/payment-methods
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - DELETE
        protocols:
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        tags:
          - payment
          - v1

      - name: payment-service-webhooks
        paths:
          - /api/v1/payments/webhooks
        methods:
          - POST
        protocols:
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        regex_priority: 3
        tags:
          - payment
          - v1
          - webhook

  # ===========================================================================
  # Notification Service
  # ===========================================================================
  - name: notification-service
    url: http://notification-service-upstream:8005
    protocol: http
    host: notification-service-upstream
    port: 8005
    path: /
    retries: 5
    connect_timeout: 10000
    write_timeout: 30000
    read_timeout: 30000
    tags:
      - notification
      - support
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 50
          hour: 2000
          policy: local
          fault_tolerant: true
          hide_client_headers: false
      - name: acl
        config:
          allow:
            - notification-service-access
            - admin-access
          hide_groups_header: true
      - name: request-size-limiting
        config:
          allowed_payload_size: 5
          size_unit: megabytes
          require_content_length: false
      - name: request-transformer
        config:
          add:
            headers:
              - "X-Service-Name: notification-service"
              - "X-Gateway-Forwarded: true"
    routes:
      - name: notification-service-send
        paths:
          - /api/v1/notifications
        methods:
          - POST
          - GET
        protocols:
          - http
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        tags:
          - notification
          - v1

      - name: notification-service-detail
        paths:
          - /api/v1/notifications/(?<notification_id>[a-zA-Z0-9\-]+)$
        methods:
          - GET
          - DELETE
        protocols:
          - http
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        regex_priority: 1
        tags:
          - notification
          - v1

      - name: notification-service-user-notifications
        paths:
          - /api/v1/users/(?<user_id>[a-zA-Z0-9\-]+)/notifications
        methods:
          - GET
        protocols:
          - http
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        regex_priority: 2
        tags:
          - notification
          - v1

      - name: notification-service-templates
        paths:
          - /api/v1/notification-templates
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - DELETE
        protocols:
          - http
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        tags:
          - notification
          - v1

      - name: notification-service-bulk
        paths:
          - /api/v1/notifications/bulk
        methods:
          - POST
        protocols:
          - http
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        regex_priority: 3
        tags:
          - notification
          - v1

  # ===========================================================================
  # Auth Service - Authentication endpoints
  # Note: Auth service itself requires key-auth (gateway-level API key)
  # to prevent unauthenticated access to the gateway. The auth service
  # handles user-level authentication (JWT tokens, login, etc.)
  # ===========================================================================
  - name: auth-service
    url: http://auth-service-upstream:8006
    protocol: http
    host: auth-service-upstream
    port: 8006
    path: /
    retries: 2
    connect_timeout: 10000
    write_timeout: 30000
    read_timeout: 30000
    tags:
      - auth
      - critical
    plugins:
      # Very strict rate limiting on auth endpoints to prevent brute force
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          second: 5
          minute: 30
          hour: 500
          policy: local
          fault_tolerant: false
          hide_client_headers: false
      - name: acl
        config:
          allow:
            - auth-service-access
            - admin-access
          hide_groups_header: true
      - name: request-size-limiting
        config:
          allowed_payload_size: 1
          size_unit: megabytes
          require_content_length: false
      - name: request-transformer
        config:
          add:
            headers:
              - "X-Service-Name: auth-service"
              - "X-Gateway-Forwarded: true"
              - "X-Security-Context: auth-critical"
    routes:
      - name: auth-service-login
        paths:
          - /api/v1/auth/login
        methods:
          - POST
        protocols:
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        regex_priority: 3
        tags:
          - auth
          - v1

      - name: auth-service-register
        paths:
          - /api/v1/auth/register
        methods:
          - POST
        protocols:
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        regex_priority: 3
        tags:
          - auth
          - v1

      - name: auth-service-refresh-token
        paths:
          - /api/v1/auth/refresh
        methods:
          - POST
        protocols:
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        regex_priority: 3
        tags:
          - auth
          - v1

      - name: auth-service-logout
        paths:
          - /api/v1/auth/logout
        methods:
          - POST
        protocols:
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        regex_priority: 3
        tags:
          - auth
          - v1

      - name: auth-service-password-reset
        paths:
          - /api/v1/auth/password-reset
        methods:
          - POST
          - PUT
        protocols:
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        regex_priority: 3
        tags:
          - auth
          - v1

      - name: auth-service-verify
        paths:
          - /api/v1/auth/verify
        methods:
          - POST
        protocols:
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        regex_priority: 3
        tags:
          - auth
          - v1

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# ACL Groups for Consumers
# Consumer group assignments control which services each consumer can access
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Note: ACL credentials must be assigned to consumers.
# This is done via the acls property on each consumer.
# Re-declaring consumers with ACL groups:
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

# The consumers section above is extended with ACL groups below.
# Kong merges consumer definitions by username.

# Unfortunately, declarative config requires all consumer properties in one block.
# The ACL plugin credentials are set here as a separate reference.
# In practice, use the Admin API or merge into the consumers block above.

# To properly assign ACL groups, update the consumers section above to include:
# (This is handled by Kong's _transform feature)

# Since we need ACL groups on consumers, we redefine with full config:
# Note: Kong declarative config merges by entity name/id

# ACL group assignments via consumer acls property
# These are applied through Kong Admin API or by adding acls to consumer definitions
